title: Fix Timer Interval Leak on Screen Transitions
summary: Timer interval continues running when navigating away from gameplay. Clear interval on screen transitions.

tasks.description: Call stopTimer() when transitioning away from gameplay screen (showLevelSelect, showChallengeConfig).
acceptance_criteria: Timer interval is cleared when going back to level select
Timer interval is cleared when going to challenge config
Timer resumes correctly when starting a new level

testing_focus: Start level, navigate back, check no interval leak
